creator: nowak@xpam.de
text:
This patch should go to ports/net-p2p/rtorrent-devel instead, right now 
we have:
ports/net-p2p/rtorrent-devel at 0.8.6 with libtorrent 0.12.6 (stable 
release at libtorrent.rakshasa.no)
versus
ports/net-p2p/rtorrent at 0.8.7 with libtorrent 0.12.7 (unstable release 
at libtorrent.rakshasa.no)
